column1: Tropical Storm Debby may produce a few tornadoes across the Peninsula with some of the feeder bands that move through. The SPC has us in a level 2 out of 5 risk.
I’d be okay with that if it got Glen Powell to my house looking like this… 🤣
this the best I can do ya... 😉
right just blow him my way
Thank you for the updates! Sun is coming up amidst a few clouds and warm breeze in San Antonio. Have a blessed Sunday!
Your the best Denis! Thank you for all the updates. We know when a tropical system is anywhere near Florida, sleep escapes you to keep us informed. We appreciate you!
As always, thank you for the updates! I check hourly! So thankful for you! Stay safe all!
It feels absolutely wonderful on the waterfront in Safety Harbor right now.
I always LOVE that dock & view in SH. Thanks for a beautiful video this morning. ❤️‍🩹
Thanks Denis! The air and breeze is wonderful in So Sarasota County at the moment!

My daughter needs to drive from Tampa to Ft Myers today.
Are you guys seeing downpour in Sarasota? Floooding?
the heavy rain just started about 5 minutes ago.
Plenty of lil Debbie's at Publix gateway!
I'm flying on tonight,,wonder if it will be delayed
Thanks for the update you’re the best
Weather going downhill now in Sarasota
Nothing but a “coolish” beautiful breeze right now in Dunedin. Was excited to be able to grab a good walk with my dog before the storm arrives !
Indian Rocks beach

great photo

🙏stay safe

Stay safe
me too , I live in a mobile home now, it’s really scary , we will be ok 🙏
Thankyou 🙏
We are still waiting for some of this rain y’all said was coming. Haven’t seen a drop!
Thank you for the update.

I can deal with this Denis, What I need to know is when it crosses over Fl. will it go to Jacksonville and when. My daughter is traveling from Jacksonville to Inverness on Tuesday morning. should she hold off?
depends on her driving skills, the storm is supposed to stall out in that area.
That's not what I wanted to hear. She's a great driver. She flew in from NY so we know if you're from NY you can drive anywhere. but it's when you don't know the back roads.
Curious what changed that tornados are now possibly more of a thing. A few days ago, very little risk, now today bumped up. Is it because the storm is further offshore?
stronger than originally expected
it can’t really be that simple?
well, it basically is! A stronger storm has more helicity in it! The angle of approach can factor in also but that hasn't changed much
Thank you for the updates .
Here in Cortez it's super windy . Dogs were barking at the fast clouds rolling through lol. No rain just lots of gusts here
I had a beautiful windy coolish morning walk along th Bay
Thanks Denis. Stay safe. It looks like Tampa is in the clear with this one.
Rain with a name I wish everyone would stop the hype the sun's out just a breeze in Sarasota
yea Tampa is in the clear
728 am and just had a heavy band of rain in Venice area - 41 and Rockley

bands are just hitting Venice now so prob a few hours

marginal is typical afternoon thinderstorm, slight is because the circulation of the feeder bands bring more rotation chances.
